title: rosa glauca f. fugax
intro: Rosa glauca f. fugax, also known as the Scotch rose, is a shrubby, deciduous rose species native to the mountainous regions of southern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa glauca f. fugax include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, thanks to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, which is used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
